category_sources: Official txt2tags site describes it as a document generator that converts minimal markup to many formats.
source_facts.description says txt2tags is a conversion tool generating several file formats.
display_name_sources: Official txt2tags homepage and GitHub repository use txt2tags.
docs_sources: Official txt2tags homepage links to the GitHub repository; its README is an official fallback documentation surface.
Official txt2tags site has a dedicated Documentation section and User Guide.
repo_sources: Official txt2tags homepage links to GitHub for contribution and source code.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was determined from official project sources.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README notes txt2tags versions run on Python.
Official txt2tags homepage says it reads minimal markup and converts to formats including HTML, LaTeX, man page, and wiki formats.
source_facts.description says txt2tags generates several file formats.
